build.//: The desktop shell wraps the geneWeave WEB BUILD. In dev the webview loads the running dev server; a production build points devUrl/window.url at your deployed geneWeave host.

security.//: Allow the webview to talk to the geneWeave server (the SPA + /api). Tighten to your host in production.

updater.//: Auto-update: the app pings `endpoints` for a signed latest.json; `pubkey` is generated with `tauri signer generate`. User data lives in appConfigDir so updates never clobber it.

bundle.shortDescription: geneWeave desktop — your AI workspace + offline notes
bundle.longDescription: The geneWeave desktop app: the full web workspace in a native shell, with a global quick-capture hotkey, an offline notes cache that reopens your last note, native menus, and signed auto-updates.
